_authority.purpose: Shadow-twin experimental build priority. The shadow BuilderOS instance uses this file (via BUILD_PRIORITY_FILE) so it competes with the primary by attacking the primary's most frequent failure points and high-priority money products first.

rules.financial_first: Same as primary: `priority` is an ordered list of product_ids by financial priority, highest first.
rules.shadow_focus: Products with the highest primary failure rate in the last 8 hours are moved to the top so the shadow tries alternative paths.
rules.maturity_fallback: Products NOT in `priority` are ranked after listed ones by definition maturity.
rules.skip_undefined: Products with no documented work are skipped until the founder adds ideas.
rules.corpus: Planner reads PRODUCT_HOME.md + conversations/*.md + sibling product docs, then writes BUILD_QUEUE.json (executable blueprint) and builds.
rules.what_matters: Adam 2026-07-12: LifeOS first (never stop; follow blueprint step-by-step), then Site Builder, MarketingOS, LimitlessOS, and the rest in financial priority order. Shadow focuses on hardest blockers so both twins learn.
rules.editable: Adam edits this list anytime. The competition script can update this list from primary failure telemetry.

notes: 2026-07-17 — Shadow twin focus created. Order seeded from primary's GOVERNED-AUTONOMOUS-FAILED commits in the last 8 hours: productized-sprint (45), lifeos (40), memory-intelligence (29), universal-overlay (28), teacher-os (18), word-keeper (12), oil-security-divisions (11), marketingos (9), ideavault (9), lifere (7).
2026-07-12 PM: Adam — LifeOS first (never stop; follow BUILD_QUEUE blueprint step-by-step). Then Site Builder, MarketingOS, LimitlessOS, and the rest in financial priority order.
